description: Enhanced workflow systems by exposing detailed execution logs via APIs so end users can troubleshoot with transparency.#Upgraded cron monitoring with runtime logging, Slack alerts for long-running jobs, and thorough statistics across workloads.#Built hourly cron analyzers that surface entity creation/update trends, flagged slow queries, and informed query + business logic tuning.#Reduced GCP logging costs by overriding noisy third-party loggers and eliminating excess statements.

Proud member of the Data ETL Clan (Zoho Desk): building a dynamic Query Builder that spins up joins on demand (with graphs for extra flair), engineered solid pre/post checks and failure handling for smooth DC migrations (yes, even the inline images behaved), tightened deployment reliability with better logs and validations, added backup limits + email nudges to keep storage civilized, and extended backup support to custom modules with some polished UI upgrades to top it off.

Built a standalone Date-Time utility that plays nicely with any app, handles time zones like a diplomat, and doesn’t get confused by daylight savings drama. Also engineered a secure Zip Extractor that smartly skips blacklisted file types and fearlessly unpacks nested zips—because one zip inside another isn’t scary, it’s just Tuesday.
